queries.q: Sketch a lean canvas for this new product idea, problem through unfair advantage
Stress-test our current business by making the implicit assumptions explicit on one page
We're comparing two strategic directions; run the canvas on each so we can diff them side by side
Onboard the new team members into our strategic thesis with one artifact
Does our thesis still hold given what we've learned this quarter? Do a reality check across the whole model
Produce the visual HTML lean canvas for the board deck, with confidence badges per block
Frame the business-model assumptions for this pivot on a single page
Before we build anything, get problem, customer, solution, and revenue onto one page so we can spot the gaps
Give me the nine-block canvas for the freemium-to-paid product line
Align the team on what we're assuming about channels, cost, and revenue for this new venture
We believe shortening onboarding will lift activation; turn that into one falsifiable statement with a metric
queries.notes: One specific testable assumption, not the whole business-model canvas

queries.q: Frame this single pricing assumption as something we can test, not the whole strategy
Compare three solution approaches to this problem in a one-page brief for stakeholders
queries.notes: A specification/options brief, not a full business-model canvas

queries.q: We haven't agreed on the problem yet; frame just that before anything else
queries.notes: Per When NOT to Use: frame the problem first, then return to the canvas

queries.q: Give me deep competitive detail on the three main rivals, not the whole business model
queries.notes: Single-block depth ask, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Why is my Vite dev server so slow to hot-reload on this project?
Write a regex to strip HTML tags from a string
Recommend a good book on negotiation
